title: tribulus littoralis
intro: Tribulus littoralis, also known as coastal tribulus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Zygophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in various forms of medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tribulus littoralis include its potential to support heart health, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Tribulus littoralis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
